visual_description: A medium shot shows two men in a warmly lit room. The man on the left, with dark hair, wears a pink and white plaid button-down shirt. He looks intently at the other man, who is seen from the back. The man on the right wears a blue and black plaid shirt. In the background, a framed picture hangs on the wall, and a wall sconce is visible on the left. The first man speaks in a slightly high-pitched, questioning tone, "What happened?" The camera cuts to a medium close-up of the man in the blue plaid shirt. He turns his head slightly and speaks with a serious expression. White text appears over him, reading, "SUPERVISING PRODUCERS" on the top line, "SHERRY BILSING-GRAHAM" in the middle, and "& ELLEN PLUMMER" on the bottom. The background is a softly lit interior with a wooden door and a plant. The second man replies in a serious and slightly exasperated voice, as if trying to jog someone's memory, "Yes, remember right before we cut the cake? I went up to you and I said..." The shot returns to the first man in the pink plaid shirt.
